examples: The dream had snapped asunder--he was awake.
The research and development that Bush tore asunder are once again becoming entwined.
Mr Schultz wants to burst asunder the bonds created by Starbucks's humble origins as a coffee shop.
But no sooner did Barack Obama ascend to the Presidency, then the country split asunder.
BMW. In a Solomon-like solution, the firm's British nameplates were split asunder after a 70-year marriage.
